title: KYC Analyst (Corporate Banking)
description:
about the company

Our client is a versatile bank that provides a comprehensive range of financial solutions, from personal banking to global corporate services. 

about the job

  • Execute comprehensive Know-Your-Customer (KYC) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD) workflows, managing the end-to-end process for both new customer onboarding and periodic reviews.

  • Operates as a critical support function within the First Line of Defense, ensuring all activities align with the bank’s internal AML/KYC Policies and Procedures and meet Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) standards.

  • Conduct thorough risk assessments and verify the completeness of all supporting documentation and CDD information for the client base

  • Perform detailed name screening and searches for both prospective clients and the existing customer base (including ad-hoc requirements).

  • Maintain and update customer lists, records, and static customer data in T24 (upon access availability for the Singapore branch).

  • Oversee the maintenance of static information for batch screening, including the systematic clearing of alerts and completeness checks.

  • Manage KYC/CDD trigger events and ensure all follow-up actions are executed in compliance with bank policy.

skills and experience required

  • A degree or diploma in a relevant field such as Business, Banking, Finance, or Accounting, or equivalent practical experience.

  • Proven experience in performing KYC within a banking environment, demonstrating a strong understanding of the end-to-end process.

  • Proficiency in banking operations and internal controls, with a specific focus on anti-money laundering (AML) frameworks.

  • Background in internal or external auditing is highly regarded and will be considered an asset to the team.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function.

(EA: 94C3609/R24124496)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
